requirements.task_name: Select and start booking the cheapest full-body color change for an SUV under $2000
requirements.task_description: Find full-body repaint packages for SUVs under $2000, sort by price, and add the cheapest qualifying package to the cart or booking.

requirements.task_name: Book the earliest available Saturday morning appointment for custom racing stripes on a coupe
requirements.task_description: Schedule the earliest available Saturday slot between 9:00–11:00 AM for a coupe custom racing stripes service and confirm the booking.

requirements.task_name: Configure a two-tone red and black gloss paint package for a 2-door coupe under $1800 and save it
requirements.task_description: Use configurator filters to find two-tone red/black gloss configurations for a 2-door coupe under $1800, pick the cheapest, and save it.

requirements.task_name: Apply a full-body color change promo code to a qualifying service over $1200
requirements.task_description: Find an active full-body color change promotion and successfully apply its promo code to a qualifying package over $1200 in the cart.

requirements.task_name: Compare ceramic vs standard clear coat for a full-body repaint and select the option with the longest warranty
requirements.task_description: Add at least one standard and one ceramic clear coat full-body repaint package to comparison, then choose the package with the longest warranty and proceed to cart or booking.

requirements.task_name: Find the highest-rated shop location within 20 miles of ZIP 90001 and open its details
requirements.task_description: Use the locations search to find shops around ZIP 90001 within 20 miles, sort by rating, open the highest-rated shop’s details, and open its map/directions view.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getLocationDetails(locationId) is called, set this variable to the provided locationId (overwriting any previous value).
required_variables.reason: Record which shop location’s detail page was opened so the evaluator can verify that it matches the highest-rated result from searchLocations(90001, 20, 'rating_high_to_low').

required_variables.set_in_function: Map/directions click handler on the location detail page (outside BusinessLogic)
required_variables.set_condition: When the user clicks the 'View Map', 'Get Directions', or similar link for a location detail page.
required_variables.value_to_set: The locationId associated with the map/directions view that was opened.
required_variables.reason: Confirm that the user actually opened the map/directions view, and that it was for the same highest-rated shop location identified for this task.

requirements.task_name: Submit a contact form request about color-matching for a fleet of 5+ vehicles
requirements.task_description: Submit a fleet/commercial contact inquiry with phone as preferred contact and a detailed message about custom color-matching for more than 5 vehicles.

requirements.task_name: Save five matte black or gray paint jobs from the gallery to favorites
requirements.task_description: Filter the gallery to matte black/gray items, favorite the first five, and then view them in the favorites section.

required_variables.set_condition: After successfully retrieving and returning the list of favorite gallery items, set this flag.
required_variables.reason: Record that the user opened the favorites page. The evaluator can then combine this with `favorite_gallery_items` and `gallery_items` to ensure that, by the time the page was viewed, at least five matte black/gray gallery items had been saved as favorites.
